name: Moberg Pharma AB (publ)
summary: Moberg Pharma AB (publ), a pharmaceutical company, develops and commercializes medical products for skin diseases in Sweden, the United States, and internationally. It develops MOB-015, which is under Phase III clinical trial for the treatment of nail fungus treatment; and BUPI, a lozenge with bupivacaine intended for pain relief in association with inflammation and ulceration of the oral mucous membranes. The company was formerly known as Moberg Derma AB (publ) and changed its name to Moberg Pharma AB (publ) in May 2013. Moberg Pharma AB (publ) was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Bromma, Sweden.
